criterion: Push retrieval benchmark score past P5 (>= 40/75) on the pinned 25-TC log using a reproducible, documented config.

acceptance_signals.description: Champion config (model + quantization + boost + mode) documented in the tracker
acceptance_signals.evidence: 2026-05-12 entry: CodeRankEmbed Q4_K_M, no prefix, bm25=5.0, mode=code → 37/75.
T5 reached 10/15 in code-mode after TC-24 unblocked (augment.rs ranks #1).

acceptance_signals.description: Code-vs-md ranking pathology investigated and either fixed or documented
acceptance_signals.evidence: Root cause confirmed: .md plans dominate top-10 in full mode; mitigated by default mode=code.

acceptance_signals.description: Reranker A/B vs no-reranker decision recorded

children.title: Query prefix experiment (negative result on Q4_K_M)
T5 expected-path fix (4 of 5 TCs had wrong truth)

progress_log.note: Initial pinned bench at HEAD ede25e69. Boost sweep on CodeRankEmbed-Q4 peaks at 35/75 at bm25=5.0.
Fixed T5 expected paths — 4 of 5 cited wrong truth lists.
Default semantic_search to mode=code — TC-24 unblocks 0/3 → 3/3 as augment.rs surfaces past .md noise.
